column1: # The AI Runtime scouting ledger. See docs/scouting-routine.md.
# track: speaker|collaborator|amplifier (one or more). status: lead -> verified -> contacted -> responded -> booked|passed.
# Run 2026-06-02 | pillar: Vertical Agents (+ adjacent Lessons from Trenches

column12: Author of 12-Factor Agents (HN-trending), AIEWF speaker, AI Tinkerers SF lead. Anti-hype, deeply practitioner. 19k X followers, open DMs, SF. Collaborator angle: AI Tinkerers cross-promo.
Talk: How to Succeed in Vertical AI. Well-known RAG/vertical-AI practitioner and instructor. 82k X followers, blue verified, SF. Now at OpenAI so booking may be slower.
Wrote Ten AI Agents Destroyed Production, Zero Postmortems and agent-security pieces. Perfect fit for Lessons from Trenches + Model Reliability. Seattle, reach via LinkedIn.
Build for chaos talk (AI Engineer Paris 2025): a live production disaster, context engineering over prompts. Need to identify the specific engineer/speaker before outreach.
AIEWF talk: real productivity data on AI coding tools across ~100k devs. Rigorous, anti-hype, data-driven. Strong voice fit. Find handle next run.
Open-source coding agents (OpenHands, formerly OpenDevin). Deeply technical OSS leader, AIEWF speaker. Founder, frame as production engineering not vendor pitch.
AIEWF talk on AI to test, review, merge, deploy code (vertical coding agent at scale). SF. Founder flag.
YouTube: How to Build Reliable AI Agents (without the hype), 130k views. On-brand anti-hype. Strong amplifier + content collaborator.
AIEWF talk: agents that automate knowledge work. Large practitioner following. Founder, best as amplifier.
Talk: Ship Your First Vertical AI Agent. Builds Agency Swarm framework. Verify X handle (vrsenai unconfirmed) next run.
